title: Pure Direct xAI Fast | Prompt Only
description: Single-call xAI fast-model baseline where answer generation receives only objective, constraints, session context, and the direct harness. The judge may still use memory for compliance scoring.

summarizerHarness.instruction: Treat this as a live MSP severity-1 incident. Keep the steps easy to follow, but provide the most detailed factual response the situation supports. Be explicit about reasoning, decision gates, tenant boundaries, evidence preservation, incident records, and communication safety.

directHarness.instruction: Treat this as a live MSP severity-1 incident. Keep the steps easy to follow, but provide the most detailed factual response the situation supports.
